opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: One minute my heart is pounding out of my chest, and the next I feel so incredibly weak and dizzy that I just black out. The nurse is here with me — I passed out earlier today walking to the bathroom.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The nurse called because I fainted earlier today while walking to the toilet, and I keep feeling my heart race and then go weak and dizzy.

symptom_narrative.onset: the tiredness and weakness have built up over about three months, but the fainting and racing heart got much worse in the last couple of days
symptom_narrative.duration: about 3 months of fatigue, with the worst episode — the faint — happening today
symptom_narrative.character: sometimes my heart pounds and races, then I go very weak and dizzy and lightheaded, and today I actually blacked out for a little while
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: very severe today — I completely passed out and I feel too weak to get out of bed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: general weakness and dizziness, and a fluttering/pounding feeling in my chest during the episodes
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes in episodes — the racing spells and the slow, weak spells seem to alternate; the dizziness is worse when I stand up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying flat and staying still seems to settle it a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up or trying to walk, and it just seems to come on by itself
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I fainted today walking to the bathroom and was out for a couple of minutes before I came round; the staff have noticed my pulse going very slow at times and racing at other times
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had a few lightheaded, near-fainting spells over the last few weeks but never actually blacked out until today
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've been getting more and more tired and short of breath doing simple things for months, and since the faint today I've been staying flat in bed because I feel too weak and dizzy to move safely

past_medical_history.how_managed: recently started on a new tablet for it

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a new heart rate tablet the doctor started recently for my blood pressure

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: frail and lethargic, slow to respond, may not fully appreciate how unwell she is and may under-report the severity of her symptoms

communication_style.typical_message_style: responds slowly and briefly, appears lethargic; nursing staff frequently need to supplement or clarify her account

access_barriers.other: patient is frail, lethargic and slow to respond this afternoon, so her own reporting may be incomplete; nursing staff present and providing corroborating history and observations

objective_data_offered.value: 42 bpm (currently), but staff say it has been as low as around 40 and as high as around 130 at other times over the last two days
objective_data_offered.timing: current reading and staff observations over the past 48 hours
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: measured by facility nursing staff on a ward device and relayed to the telehealth clinician; the alternating fast/slow readings are staff observations, not continuously recorded, and not independently verified

objective_data_offered.timing: checked by nursing staff this afternoon
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading measured by facility nursing staff, not independently verified by the telehealth clinician

objective_data_offered.timing: checked by nursing staff this afternoon
checked by nursing staff this afternoon
